summary: Developed a comprehensive ES6+ JavaScript module including async/await, destructuring, modules, and modern syntax for beginner-to-intermediate learners.
Authored and delivered a structured React.js module covering component architecture, hooks, state management, and routing for workshop participants.
Designed 'StayHalal', a Sharia-compliant e-wallet app concept, as a finalist in the KORMA 13 UI/UX design competition. Focused on Islamic finance usability and clean visual hierarchy.
Assisted in OOP lab sessions using Java (NetBeans). Guided students through encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and basic design patterns.
